description: Create a Windows GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on push and pull request to the master branch. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run jobs on different Windows environments (2019 and latest) with various compilers (MSVC and GCC), sanitizers (address and none), TLS (true and false), and debug settings (true and false). Each job checks out the repository, installs dependencies, configures Meson, builds, and tests the project.
